title: `execution-to-prd` and the grill mint UUIDv7 for new PRDs and ADRs
description: Update the `execution-to-prd` skill and the grill so newly authored PRDs (JSON) and ADRs (markdown) mint a UUIDv7 id instead of the next sequential number. Must ship only after the `prd`/PRD id patterns are widened (EXEC-097), or references to a UUID PRD fail validation (G5).
acceptance_criteria: A new PRD authored by `execution-to-prd` carries a UUIDv7 id and a slug-suffixed filename
A new ADR carries a UUIDv7 in its frontmatter
Does not ship before EXEC-097's pattern widening; a UUID PRD validates and is referenceable by issues
Skill edits read fresh from disk (no stale-content / linter-revert window) — sprint-8 lesson
